name: Schweinekotelett in Zweibelsosse (Pork Chops in Onion Sauce)
recipeInstructions:
1. Thinly slice the onions.
2. Season pork chops with salt and pepper; coat with flour.
3. Heat oil in a heavy frypan. Add pork chops; fry for 3 minutes on each side.
4. Add onions; cook for another 5 minutes, turning chops once.
5. Pour in beer and beef broth; cover and simmer for 15 minutes.
6. Remove pork chops to a preheated platter.
7. Season sauce to taste.
8. Blend cornstarch with a small amount of cold water. Stir into sauce and cook until thick and bubbly.
9. Pour over pork chops.
10. Serve with Brussels sprouts and boiled potatoes.
